summary: The implementation covers all major requirements for study material upload functionality and footer phone number display. Backend data types, CRUD operations, and proper authorization are in place. Frontend includes admin material management page, student materials page, React Query hooks, navigation updates, and footer phone number. Some minor acceptance criteria details (file type restrictions, file size warnings, mobile menu verification) cannot be fully verified from the truncated diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Upload progress indicator with percentage display in AdminMaterialsPage.tsx
hallucinated_features.reason: The diff shows implementation of upload progress tracking using setUploadProgress and ExternalBlob.withUploadProgress() method, but this feature was not requested in any requirement

hallucinated_features.description: Automatic first-user admin grant functionality in useActor.ts
hallucinated_features.reason: The file summary mentions automatic first-user admin grant functionality, checks admin status on login and grants access if no admins exist which was not part of the BuildRequest requirements
